title: What characters should be expanded upon
display_title: What characters should be expanded upon
wikitext:
[]: What characters should be expanded upon?             Quote Post by Houndour » Sun Jan 28, 2007 11:29 pm Fairly self explanatory - which ones do you want to see more of, learn more about? For me, it'd be good if Rei became a more concrete character. Although I'm not the best at picking up on subtleties, the stuff I have established about her by watching the series, in my mind, is flimsy. Also, besides the fact that they're supporting figures to the plot, a further look at the Nerv gang (Maya, Motoko and Shigeru) would be good.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jan 29, 2007 12:01 am I've never been a big fan of Rei, I always thought she was a bit one dimensional. It would be interesting if they could make her more dynamic without completely changing her character.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Jan 29, 2007 1:14 am I dunno if I want to see Rei explored much more, part of what I found interesting about her was her mystery. Meh. Though I'd still love to see more of Kaworu, so I'm happy it seems that'll happen. Though, since they are bringing in Kaworu earlier, it seems to make sense to me that they might be focussing a tad on Toji more too.

[]:             Quote Post by Shawn Dudley » Mon Jan 29, 2007 2:54 am I think they will focus a LOT more on both Rei and Kaworu, as they are both key to unlocking the secrets of the story. The Japanese have always liked Rei the most among all the EVA characters (and frankly, she grows on me as well), so I would suspect we're going to see much more of her in the new movies, and possibly even a stronger Rei/Shinji pairing than was hinted at in the TV series (Sadamoto's already sort of done that in the manga). Another character I'd like to see expanded on is actually Gendo - it would be interesting to see him at Shinji's age, or a bit older, and what he was like.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Jan 29, 2007 4:33 pm I would like to see a little more of Rei as well but who I want them to really flesh out is Kaji. His background and the fact that he is a spy for all three factions is very intriguing. Along with that I want to know more about the entirely new character they are creating for the movie. One thing I am not looking foward to is their revamp of the SEELE and Nerv emblems to that of something similiar to Apple Computers. (i.e. an apple with a bite taken out of it.)

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Jan 29, 2007 4:36 pm Hunter21 wrote: One thing I am not looking foward to is their revamp of the SEELE and Nerv emblems to that of something similiar to Apple Computers. (i.e. and apple with a bite taken out of it.)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jan 29, 2007 6:37 pm BobBQ wrote: Hunter21 wrote: One thing I am not looking foward to is their revamp of the SEELE and Nerv emblems to that of something similiar to Apple Computers. (i.e. and apple with a bite taken out of it.)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 29, 2007 6:57 pm Rei and Kaworu getting expanded upon but having the same personalities would be nice. Also, seeing Asuka's childhood in Germany, before, after and during the ordeal with her mother. ie, when and why did Misato live with her for awhile anyway, before Asuka was with Kaji as the start of 22' states? More of Kaji, Misato and Ritsuko in their college days would be nice too, and what the hell, showing Shinji what it was like while he was at his sensei, as a way to see how much he really grew since then.

[]:             Quote Post by Shawn Dudley » Mon Jan 29, 2007 10:23 pm I wanna see how Misato got PenPen!!!

[]:             Quote Post by terminus » Mon Jan 29, 2007 11:06 pm hmmm.. maybe more elaboration on first and second impact, and of course Pen Pen!

[]:             Quote Post by Big Panda » Tue Jan 30, 2007 2:01 am Kensuke Aida! Why? No one has mentioned, neither will. I like to keep original ^^

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Tue Jan 30, 2007 3:43 am Big Panda wrote: Kensuke Aida! Why? No one has mentioned, neither will. I like to keep original ^^

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Wed Jan 31, 2007 5:25 pm I for one would like to see characters that were mentioned but got little, if any, screen time. Misato's Dad, for example, would be good if for no other reason than to see the 2I from his POV.

[]:             Quote Post by Res Novae » Wed Jan 31, 2007 5:33 pm BobBQ wrote: I mean, it's pretty obvious by now that Steve Jobs is one of them.

[]:             Quote Post by GoJu » Wed Jan 31, 2007 9:27 pm AuthenticM wrote: Big Panda wrote: Kensuke Aida! Why? No one has mentioned, neither will. I like to keep original ^^

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Wed Jan 31, 2007 11:12 pm I"m kinda hoping that Toji, Kensuke, and Hikari don't just fade away like they did in the anime. Anywho, the character I want them to expand on the most is.........Asuka. =)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 31, 2007 11:42 pm Tokpile Quohog wrote: Anywho, the character I want them to expand on the most is.........Asuka. =)

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Jan 31, 2007 11:44 pm Reichu wrote: In before bad puns.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Thu Feb 01, 2007 1:10 am I'd like it if they expanded on everyone. That way, everyone wins, and no one gets shafted character wise, Rei style!

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Fri Feb 02, 2007 3:03 pm There are several characters I'd like to see "expand" upon, however just in certain areas. Have to remember this will be four movies which I'll assume to be around two hours each, thus about eight hours to explain everything, meaning every minute is precious and needs to be used accordingly. Starting off, I'd like to see Gendo "expand" upon. We got to see a lot of him from the outside, but not enough from the inside. I'd like to see him more by himself, or in his more private moments (no pun intended). How he acted around Yui (as she stated he's different around her, which I believe her, he most likely did act different around her.), some of the stuff he did behind the scenes we never saw. I'd like to see more on him right before the second impact, how he just kind of "disappeared" of sorts. Use his character to flesh out more of the story that was never fully explained in the original EVA series. Now, much like Gendo, I'd like to see more of Kaji. He is a triple agent via all three organizations, thus he could really patch a lot of stuff up. I'd like to see more of him and also Asuka in Germany as well. Which leads me to Asuka, I'd like to see more of her from the time between her mother's death and her arrival, more on her and Kaji, and perhaps a little bit about her exceeding through school and college, not to mention the German branch. I hope they don't dwell too far into this, maybe just a few minutes here or there from it, would be good for depth. Shinji is a character that would be nice if they cut down a bit on, but added a little element to him. The "Berserker" aspect from the EVA was kind of a signal of Shinji in himself. Perhaps not related in the original aspect, but during the ending parts of the movies, it'd be interesting to see him just kind of loose it in that way, then he keeps at it and pretty much looses it more and then we have the screaming insane "out of my mind" Shinji that is about to just break. It seems more realistic and fitting for his character then how he was portrayed, but hey, I'm not Anno. It might take away from his "anti-hero" a bit, but I think in essence it would actually add to it. Seeing as he'd be fighting for almost no cause at that point.
